arts.ttl: On-loan Vitor Roque shows both why Barcelona signed him and let him go vs Getafe
arts.sum: The display put forth by Barcelona youngster Vitor Roque for Real Betis this evening highlighted both exactly why the Blaugrana brought him in in the first place, and why they…

arts.ttl: EA FC 25: Lamine Yamal's rating has been leaked and it's shocking
arts.sum: With ratings yet to be finalised for a number of players, many have been anticipating where Barcelona's wonderkid will rank among the game's best and brightest. Whether or not Yamal's rating should be higher is up for debate - as are most of EA's ratings in their flagship sports game - but what is surprising is that, if leaks are accurate, the Spain star will only have an overall pace stat of 82 despite his blistering speed.

arts.ttl: ‘That’s the key’ - Monaco boss talks defending Lewandowski, Raphinha and Yamal
arts.sum: Monaco boss Adi Hutter has told his team to go ‘all out’ when it comes to defending against Barcelona in the Champions League on Thursday. Hansi Flick takes his team to France after making a perfect start to the new La Liga season, and Hutter says his players must be brave.

arts.ttl: Team News: Monaco vs. Barcelona injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Champions League clash between Monaco and Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick hints at new role for Barcelona youngster vs Monaco
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has on Wednesday evening provided an insight into his plans for returning attacker Ansu Fati. The name of wide-man Ansu has of course positioned itself…

arts.ttl: ‘It’s madness’ – Barcelona’s Jules Koundé backs Rodri’s calls for player strike over packed calendar
arts.sum: Luke Entwistle reporting from Monaco Manchester City midfielder Rodri (28) evoked the idea of a strike in reaction to the increasingly packed schedule. Barcelona’s Jules Koundé (25) has echoed those…

arts.ttl: ‘One of the best’ – Monaco star heaps praise on Barcelona boss Hansi Flick
arts.sum: A leading member of the midfield ranks at AS Monaco has on Wednesday moved to reveal his admiration for Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick. This, of course, comes ahead of…

arts.ttl: Barcelona to scout 2 Monaco players during Champions League clash
arts.sum: When Barcelona take to the Stade Louis II pitch against Monaco, sporting director Deco is set to personally scout Caio Henrique and Vanderson as players who fill a need back in Catalonia. But SPORT writes that the Barcelona hierarchy still wish to target recruits at right-back and left-back to strengthen in the winter window, all the while continuing to offer chances to home-grown talent.
